title: heteroderis pusilla var. chaetocephala

The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include promoting relaxation, reducing stress, and improving sleep quality due to its sedative and calming effects. Heteroderis pusilla var. chaetocephala contains bioactive constituents such as flavonoids, alkaloids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its therapeutic actions, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antispasmodic properties.
